description: Canonical role-based access control for the Lattice Vault subsystem.

rules.description: High-risk records may only be deleted by governance_operator.
Constitutional artifacts are immutable except via governance amendment process.
rules.constraint: record_type in {governance_record, lineage_record} → no direct delete by operator or system

rules.description: Operators may not modify access or retention policies.
All write operations must be auditable.
rules.constraint: actions in {commit, lock, archive, delete, override} → audit_event_required == true
